summary: Corrected a typo in the generated dump README template: the GALE01.map bullet now calls it a CodeWarrior map file instead of a MetroWorks map file. This was a one-line documentation/tooling fix under .github/packages/dump-asm with no code behavior changes.

what_changed.change: Changed the generated README text from "MetroWorks map file" to "CodeWarrior map file" for the GALE01.map link.

smart_moves: Kept the fix narrowly scoped to the README generation template, so future dump READMEs inherit the corrected terminology.
Preserved the existing GALE01.map link and Dolphin usage note, changing only the inaccurate compiler/toolchain name.
decomp_lessons: For project-facing dump documentation, prefer precise toolchain terminology: GALE01.map should be described as a CodeWarrior map file.
Small wording fixes in generator templates are preferable to patching generated output, because they prevent the typo from recurring.

naming_conventions.lesson: Use this wording for GALE01.map in dump README text rather than "MetroWorks map file".
Continue referring to the map file by its established project filename.

follow_up_queries: Find other documentation references to "MetroWorks map file" that should say "CodeWarrior map file".
Check dump-asm README generator wording for other stale or inaccurate toolchain terminology.
